keyOpen.tooltip: Set keybinding(s) to show the network applet menu.

cap-vpn-list.tooltip: When enabled, the VPN section shows only the configured number of connections inline; the rest move into a "More" submenu. Disabled by default so the upstream behaviour of listing every VPN inline is preserved.

num-visible-vpns.tooltip: Number of VPN connections shown inline before the rest move into the "More" submenu.
